title: Calcium chloride preparation of competent cells
steps: Innoculate 1-2 mls LB (no antibiotics) with single colony of cells and incubate at 37 °C overnight with shaking.
Use 1/100 volume of overnight to start culture. i.e. If you are growing up 50 mls of competent cells, than add 500 μL of starter.
Grow cells to OD 600 of 0.5-0.7 at 37 °C.
Put flask of cells in ice water for 15+ minutes.
Spin down cells at 5K rpm for 10 min in sterile 50 mL conical tube.
Pour off supernatant and resuspend cells in 50 ml of 0.1M CaCl 2 and keep on Ice for 1hr.
Spin down cells at 5K rpm for 10 min.
Pour off supernatant and resuspend cells in 5 ml of 0.1M CaCl 2 ,15% glycerol
Snap freeze 100 μL aliquots in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 ºC.
0.1M CaCl 2 and 0.1M CaCl 2 in 15% glycerol should be autoclaved before use LB media tube and flask for LB growth
creator: Moriah Beck
